title: FDA Variance Applications Quiz
description: Test your knowledge of FDA variance application procedures

questions.question: What is the deadline for submitting the annual report (Form FDA 3636) for current variance holders?
questions.explanation: Current variance holders must submit Form FDA 3636 by September 1st each year to have their variance approval automatically extended another year.

questions.question: Which Laser Notices provide clarification on laser light show procedures and the automatic renewal policy?
questions.explanation: Laser Notices #51 and #55 contain clarification of laser light show procedures and the automatic renewal policy for annual reports.

questions.question: Select all product types that require variance applications under 21 CFR 1040.10(b)(13):
questions.explanation: Class IIIB/3B, Class IV/4, or Risk Group 3 laser light shows, laser projectors, laser-illuminated projectors (LIP), laser-illuminated lighting instruments (LILI), and other demonstration laser products require variance applications. Class 2 laser pointers do not require variances.

questions.question: Scenario: You are a laser light show producer preparing to submit a variance application. Which forms are REQUIRED for your application?
questions.explanation: Laser Light Show Producers (considered manufacturers) must submit Form FDA 3147 (Variance Application) and Form FDA 3640 (Laser Light Show Report). Form FDA 3632 is not required for light show producers.

questions.question: A laser projector MANUFACTURER applying for a variance must submit which forms?
questions.explanation: Laser Projector Manufacturers must submit all three forms: Form FDA 3147 (Variance Application), Form FDA 3640 (Laser Light Show Report), and Form FDA 3632 (Laser Product Report).

questions.question: LIP/LILI Dealers/Distributors must submit Form FDA 3640 as part of their variance application.
questions.explanation: False. LIP/LILI Dealers/Distributors only need to submit Form FDA 3147. They do not need to submit Forms 3640 or 3632.

questions.question: What email address should variance applications be sent to?
questions.explanation: All variance application documents should be emailed as separate PDF attachments to RadHealthCustomerService@fda.hhs.gov.

questions.question: Put the following variance application steps in the correct order:
items: Include firm name in email subject line
Prepare required forms and cover sheet
Receive acknowledgement letter with Accession number
questions.explanation: The correct sequence is: 1) Prepare required forms and cover sheet, 2) Email documents to CDRH, 3) Include firm name in email subject line, 4) Receive acknowledgement letter with Accession number.

questions.question: According to Laser Notice #22, when is a laser light show producer considered a 'manufacturer'?
options: Only when they build laser projectors from components
When they assemble a show using previously manufactured lasers, changing the intent and use
Only when they import laser equipment
Never - producers are always considered operators
questions.explanation: According to Laser Notice #22 (November 22, 1977), the act of assembly of a laser light show using previously manufactured lasers results in the creation of a 'new' product, making the producer a 'manufacturer' if engaged in the business of manufacturing laser light shows.

questions.question: Which of the following are required items on the variance application checklist?
options: All applicable sections of required forms are completed
Applicant's email address provided on all forms
All forms signed by the manufacturer
Include at least one make and model of laser product
questions.explanation: The variance application checklist requires: completed form sections, applicant's email on all forms, manufacturer signatures, and at least one make/model of laser product. There is no $500 filing fee requirement or notarization requirement mentioned.

questions.question: Match the variance request type with its description:

pairs.definition: New variance application for first-time approval

questions.question: A variance holder missed the September 1st annual report deadline in 2024. When should they submit their renewal request?
options: Wait until the next regular renewal cycle
Immediately submit with cover sheet indicating expired status
Submit by December 31st with late fee
Reapply as a new original application only
questions.explanation: If a variance has expired due to failure to submit a previous annual report, the holder should submit a renewal request immediately using the cover sheet. The cover sheet specifically addresses this scenario for expired variances.

questions.question: What tracking numbers are issued during variance application processing?
options: Accession number from CDRH/DCC and Docket number from DMS
FDA Registration number and Docket number
questions.explanation: CDRH/DCC issues acknowledgement letters with Accession numbers, and the FDA Dockets Management Staff (DMS) also issues a Docket number. Applications do not need to be separately sent to DMS as CDRH forwards them automatically.

questions.question: Scenario: A company has a permanent LIP installation at their venue. Which forms do they need for their variance application?
questions.explanation: LIP/LILI Users with permanent installations only need to submit Form FDA 3147. They do not need to submit Forms 3640 or 3632.

questions.question: The variance number format is: ____-V-____
questions.explanation: Variance numbers follow the format yyyy-V-xxxx, where yyyy represents the year and xxxx represents a sequential number.
